summary: Tested multilingual i18n feature (EN/DE/FR/IT). Language switcher, sidebar/dashboard translations, persistence (localStorage 'aos_lang'), and page navigation all work correctly across all 4 languages. Found and fixed a critical missing import bug in InvoiceModule.jsx that crashed Payables and Receivables pages.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing `import { useI18n } from '@/i18n/I18nContext'` caused ReferenceError: useI18n is not defined, crashing /payables and /receivables pages with 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay. Fixed by adding the missing import.

action_items: Verify fix in /app/frontend/src/components/InvoiceModule.jsx (added `import { useI18n } from '@/i18n/I18nContext';`). Consider adding an ErrorBoundary around route content so a single missing import doesn't blank the entire page next time.
critical_code_review_comments: InvoiceModule.jsx uses useI18n() but the import was omitted — indicative that the i18n refactor was not smoke-tested on Payables/Receivables. Recommend a repo-wide grep after such refactors: `grep -rL 'from .@/i18n/I18nContext' $(grep -rl 'useI18n(' src)`.
No React ErrorBoundary at route level — any runtime error in a page blanks the whole content (only a dev overlay is shown). Add ErrorBoundary in Layout so users see a graceful fallback.
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n verified across EN/DE/FR/IT: sidebar nav labels, dashboard title+cards, page headers (Companies, Payables, Receivables, VAT, Reports, Settings, Excel Center), logout button, search placeholder, tagline all translate. Persistence via localStorage 'aos_lang' confirmed across hard reload. Switching back to EN restores English labels. No console crashes after InvoiceModule import fix.
rca of the issue: Root cause: InvoiceModule.jsx invokes `const { t } = useI18n();` on line 18 but the file's import block never imports useI18n from '@/i18n/I18nContext'. This produced a ReferenceError at component mount which propagated to React's error overlay and blanked /payables and /receivables. Reproduction: login → switch to any language (or default EN) → navigate to /payables. Mitigation: added the missing import.
